message:
fix: eagerly import Login/AuthCallback to prevent chunk_load errors (#9819)

* fix: eagerly import Login and AuthCallback to prevent chunk_load errors

The Login and AuthCallback components were lazy-loaded via safeLazy(),
which caused chunk_load errors on /login when the browser navigated
away during OAuth redirects before the chunk finished downloading.

Since both components are small (~579 and ~150 lines) and on the
critical auth path, they are now eagerly imported so they are always
available in the main bundle.

Additionally, the GlobeAnimation lazy import inside Login.tsx now
swallows import failures so a missing/stale Three.js chunk doesn't
crash the login page — the globe is cosmetic and gracefully degrades.

Fixes #9803

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix: correct TypeScript type for GlobeAnimation fallback component

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix: use async/await with type cast for GlobeAnimation fallback

TypeScript infers a union type from .then/.catch chains, which
lazy() rejects. Use async/await with explicit type cast instead.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
